March 11, 2026

Claude Desktop now supports inline visualization of data charts and graphs.

Chrome extension adds new tab management features for browser agent workflows.

  • Claude Opus 4.6 model update with expanded context window to 1M tokens.

    • Short text

    February 5, 2026

    Claude for PowerPoint add-in launches as a research preview for office plugin users.

  • Claude for Excel add-in now supports pivot tables and conditional formatting.

    • January 24, 2026

    Claude Desktop cowork mode available on Windows and macOS.
